recent_projects.name: dicomtoolsformcp
recent_projects.summary: 基于 MCP (Model Context Protocol) 的 DICOM 医学影像文件分析工具

recent_projects.name: aigroup-stata-mcp
recent_projects.summary: A Stata integration server based on Model Context Protocol (MCP) that allows AI assistants to execute Stata scripts, fetch data information, and run statistical analysis.

recent_projects.name: doc-manager-mcp
recent_projects.summary: MCP server for comprehensive documentation lifecycle management

recent_projects.name: fiftyone-devicedetection-onpremise
recent_projects.summary: This project contains 51Degrees Device Detection OnPremise engine that can be used with the 51Degrees Pipeline API. The Pipeline is a generic web request intelligence and data processing solution with the ability to add a range of 51Degrees and/or custom plug ins (Engines)
recent_projects.author: 51Degrees Engineering

recent_projects.name: fiftyone-devicedetection
recent_projects.summary: 51Degrees Device Detection parses HTTP headers to return detailed hardware, operating system, browser, and crawler information for the devices used to access your website or service. This is an alternative to popular UAParser, DeviceAtlas, and WURFL packages.
recent_projects.author: 51Degrees Engineering

recent_projects.name: fiftyone-devicedetection-shared
recent_projects.summary: The 51Degrees Pipeline API is a generic web request intelligence and data processing solution with the ability to add a range of 51Degrees and/or custom plug ins (Engines). This project contains 51Degrees Device Detection engines that can be used with the Pipeline API.
recent_projects.author: 51Degrees Engineering
